'''thahunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khateeb|khateeb]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khateeb|khateeb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thahunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæhinith|thæhinith]] || [[word:thæhinij|thæhinij]] || [[word:thæhinish|thæhinish]] || [[word:thæhini|thæhini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thahuhunuth|thahuhunuth]] || [[word:thahuhunuj|thahuhunuj]] || [[word:thahuhunush|thahuhunush]] || [[word:thahuhunu|thahuhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahunuth|thahunuth]] || [[word:thahunuj|thahunuj]] || [[word:thahunush|thahunush]] || [[word:thahunu|thahunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahufnuth|thahufnuth]] || [[word:thahufnuj|thahufnuj]] || [[word:thahufnush|thahufnush]] || [[word:thahufnuf|thahufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thahunuthu|thahunuthu]] || [[word:thahunuju|thahunuju]] || [[word:thahunushu|thahunushu]] || [[word:thahunuku|thahunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thahunuth|thahunuth]] || [[word:thahunuj|thahunuj]] || [[word:thahunush|thahunush]] || [[word:thahunu|thahunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thahunuthul|thahunuthul]] || [[word:thahunujul|thahunujul]] || [[word:thahunushul|thahunushul]] || [[word:thahunukul|thahunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thahunuthuthu|thahunuthuthu]] || [[word:thahunujuju|thahunujuju]] || [[word:thahunushushu|thahunushushu]] || [[word:thahunuku|thahunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thahunuthun|thahunuthun]] || [[word:thahunujun|thahunujun]] || [[word:thahunushun|thahunushun]] || [[word:thahunukun|thahunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thahunuthuoro|thahunuthuoro]] || [[word:thahunujuoro|thahunujuoro]] || [[word:thahunushuoro|thahunushuoro]] || [[word:thahunukuoro|thahunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
